title: Olearia oraria

It is a member of the genus Olearia, which consists of shrubs and small trees native to Australia and New Zealand. Olearia oraria is closely related to other species within the genus, sharing similar characteristics and growth habits. The classification of Olearia oraria reflects its unique position within the plant kingdom.
uses: Olearia oraria, also known as the mountain daisy, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory properties.
